scripts.build:images: echo 'Use GitHub Actions workflows (.github/workflows/images*.yml) for canonical image builds'
scripts.generate:manager-openapi: cargo run --bin alien-manager-schema-exporter --features openapi -p alien-manager -- --output crates/alien-manager/openapi.json && cp crates/alien-manager/openapi.json client-sdks/manager/openapi.json
scripts.generate:manager-rust-sdk: pnpm run generate:manager-openapi && openapi-down-convert -i crates/alien-manager/openapi.json -o client-sdks/manager/openapi-3.0.json && openapi-down-convert -i crates/alien-manager/openapi.json -o client-sdks/manager/rust/openapi-3.0.json && cd client-sdks/manager && node scripts/fix-openapi.mjs && cd rust && node ../scripts/fix-openapi.mjs
